name: El Templo
description: A beautifully balanced and sweet coffee, perfect for your daily brew. It’s our go-to cup for a smooth, reliable start to the day with deep notes of cocoa and a cherry finish.

name: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe
description: A bright and vibrant coffee for the adventurous. This washed-process bean has a clean, tea-like body and a wonderfully complex, blueberry and floral finish.

name: Gayo Mountain
description: For those who love a rich and earthy cup. This bean has a full, syrupy body featuring notes of dark chocolate and cedar that stands up perfectly to milk.

name: Kenya Nyeri
description: A sophisticated cup characterized by its sharp acidity and juicy mouthfeel. Expect intense blackcurrant sweetness tempered by a crisp grapefruit finish.

name: Colombia Huila
description: Classic and comforting. This Huila selection offers a heavy caramel sweetness and the crispness of red apple, rounded out by a smooth milk chocolate body.

name: Natural Sidamo
description: A fruit-forward powerhouse. As a naturally processed coffee, it retains a heavy strawberry sweetness and a rich cacao undertone that is truly unique.
